zh: 一般說來、心情輕鬆愉快就容易入睡、
en: Generally speaking, a relaxed mind falls asleep easily.

zh: 父母親應表現出一種愉快的態度、
en: parents should show a cheerful demeanor,

zh: 在說說笑笑中愉快的上床、
en: and go to bed together amid smiles and laughter.

zh: 使他心情緊張、甚至轉為反抗、
en: making them tense or even rebellious.
Sometimes, when something special is happening at home,

zh: 父母可在適當的情況下以輕鬆愉快的口吻提醒孩子。
en: and parents can remind them gently and warmly at the right moment.
